metadata.description: Free, open-source Claude Code skills by Bubble Invest — small sharp utilities for agentic workflows.

plugins.name: socratic-spec
plugins.description: Run a Socratic specification interview to turn a vague idea into a precise, buildable spec before writing any code.

plugins.name: suno-extract
plugins.description: Extract the MP3 from any Suno song URL via the public API. No key needed.

plugins.name: telegram-reporter
plugins.description: Send Telegram messages from any script or cron via curl. Reads a bot token from a config file.

plugins.name: scheduled-task-creation
plugins.description: Step-by-step guide for creating and debugging Claude Desktop scheduled tasks (local routines).

plugins.name: notion-linker
plugins.description: Automatically link published content (articles, posts) back to project rows in a Notion database.

plugins.name: generate-image
plugins.description: Generate images locally with FLUX.2 Klein via mflux on Apple Silicon. Free, offline, no API calls.

plugins.name: notion-reader
plugins.description: Query a Notion database or page from any script. Reads a token from config; DB/page IDs via env vars.

plugins.name: local-tts
plugins.description: Local text-to-speech (VoxCPM2, 30 languages, voice cloning). Free, offline, Apple Silicon.

plugins.name: boycott-filter
plugins.description: Tell your agent which brands to avoid; a Chrome extension warns you on their pages with your own reasons.
